decks.notes: The deck focuses on dealing damage quickly and efficiently through direct damage spells and creatures with burn abilities. It aims to overwhelm the opponent by continuously hitting their creatures and life points, utilizing cards like Lightning Bolt, Fiery Temper, and Fireblast. Additionally, cards like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather further enhance the aggressive strategy by dealing additional damage. The deck also includes cards like Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery to provide resource advantage and further pressure the opponent. Finally, cards like Faithless Looting and Sneaky Snacker help with card draw and board presence.

This deck focuses on quickly assembling the combo of Balustrade Spy and Dread Return to mill your entire deck and return Lotleth Giant to the battlefield, dealing lethal damage to your opponent. It uses a combination of cheap creatures and mana ramp to set up the combo quickly, while also providing card draw and graveyard recursion to ensure its success. The key strategy is to efficiently ramp up your mana, find your combo pieces, and execute the combo to win the game in a single explosive turn.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through disruption spells and removal, while also utilizing card draw and graveyard manipulation. By using cards like Counterspell, Snuff Out, and Thought Scour, the goal is to keep the opponent from establishing a strong board presence while digging for key cards like Gurmag Angler and Murmuring Mystic. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently trading resources and generating incremental advantage through its various control elements. The inclusion of evasion creatures like Tolarian Terror and Lórien Revealed helps close out the game once control is established.

This deck focuses on aggressive play with a combination of removal spells and creature threats, aiming to control the board and pressure the opponent. It utilizes artifacts and sacrifice effects to generate value and maintain card advantage. The key strategy is to efficiently deal damage while disrupting the opponent's game plan, using a mix of direct damage spells, creatures with evasion, and resilient threats. Additionally, the deck has a strong mana base with a balance of lands and color sources to support its aggressive game plan.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through removal and disruption while generating value through sacrificing creatures and gaining life. It utilizes a combination of low-cost removal spells, creature sacrifice effects, and card draw to outvalue opponents and maintain board control. The deck aims to stall the game until it can overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient threats and card advantage, ultimately grinding out a victory through attrition.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent through a combination of cheap creatures and direct burn spells. By efficiently utilizing low-cost creatures and powerful burn spells, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain momentum throughout the game. Additionally, cards like Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery can provide additional value by stealing opponent's resources and gaining card advantage. The deck also includes some card draw and ways to discard cards to ensure consistency in drawing key pieces.

This deck is focused on quickly dealing damage to the opponent using low-cost burn spells and aggressive creatures. By efficiently utilizing cards like Fiery Temper, Lightning Bolt, and Lava Dart, the goal is to chip away at the opponent's life total as quickly as possible. The inclusion of cards like Guttersnipe and Fireblast provide additional reach and damage potential. Additionally, cards like Kessig Flamebreather and Voldaren Epicure provide consistent threats to pressure the opponent. Overall, the strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless stream of burn damage and creature attacks.

The focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with low-cost aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Clockwork Percussionist, Goblin Tomb Raider, and Reckless Lackey, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. Cards like Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt provide additional reach to finish off the opponent or clear blockers. The deck also has equipment like Inventor's Axe to improve creature effectiveness and close out games quickly. Overall, the main goal is to deal damage efficiently and win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on aggressive plays and efficient creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Utilizing cards like Kor Skyfisher, Glint Hawk, and Thraben Inspector, the deck aims to apply pressure early in the game. The deck also includes removal spells like Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt to deal with threats from the opposing deck. Additionally, the deck includes artifact hate with Relic of Progenitus and Bojuka Bog to disrupt graveyard strategies. With a mix of creatures, removal, and disruption, this deck aims to win swiftly and decisively in Pauper 1 vs 1 matches.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of small, efficient white creatures known as weenies. By quickly deploying a variety of low-cost creatures and using combat tricks and token generation, the deck aims to maintain board presence and apply pressure on the opponent early in the game. Additionally, the deck includes some control elements such as Mana Tithe and Prismatic Strands to protect its creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the strategy revolves around aggression, efficiency, and resilience in the face of threats.

The deck is centered around aggressive red creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent and win the game. It includes cards like Goblin Bushwhacker, Lightning Bolt, and Galvanic Blast to deal direct damage, as well as creatures like Burning-Tree Emissary and Voldaren Epicure to apply pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes some card draw and utility cards like Reckless Impulse and Wrenn's Resolve to maintain momentum. Overall, the main goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient offense.

The main strategy of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of artifact creatures and spells, focusing on utilizing affinity to cast powerful spells for a low cost. The deck includes a mix of artifact creatures like Myr Enforcer and Refurbished Familiar, along with card draw spells like Thoughtcast to maintain card advantage. Cards like Galvanic Blast and Krark-Clan Shaman provide direct damage to the opponent while also removing threats from the board. Overall, this deck aims to quickly build a board presence and apply pressure to the opponent to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing Ephemerate and other spells to continually recycle powerful effects like Snap and Mulldrifter. By utilizing cards like God-Pharaoh's Faithful and Lórien Revealed, the deck aims to gain life and draw cards to outvalue the opponent. The deck also includes a variety of counter spells like Negate and Prohibit to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of card draw, counterspells, and value generation through recursion, this control deck aims to outlast the opponent and grind out a victory.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of Goblins and various spells to create powerful synergies that can quickly overwhelm your opponent. By utilizing cards like First Day of Class, Skirk Prospector, and Putrid Goblin, the deck aims to generate mana and draw cards while also controlling the board with cards like Duress and Fanatical Offering. The inclusion of combo pieces like Stormshriek Feral and Boiling Rock Prison further solidify the deck's strategy of quickly assembling a lethal board presence and disrupting the opponent's game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by efficiently utilizing the Urzatron lands (Urza's Tower, Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant) to generate a large amount of mana. This mana is then used to cast powerful creatures like Maelstrom Colossus and Pinnacle Kill-Ship, as well as support cards like Prophetic Prism and Ancient Stirrings. The deck also includes cards for disruption and card advantage, such as Relic of Progenitus and Wretched Gryff. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big threats while maintaining control of the game.

The main concept of this deck is to take control of the game through card advantage and tempo manipulation. Using cards like Ephemerate and Snap to bounce creatures and generate value, along with powerful control spells like Mulldrifter and Meeting of Minds, this deck aims to outvalue and outpace the opponent. By utilizing cards like Lórien Revealed and Archaeomancer to recur important spells, this deck can grind out a win through incremental advantage while maintaining a solid defense with cards like God-Pharaoh's Faithful and Sunscape Familiar. The deck also includes some land destruction elements with Contaminated Landscape to disrupt the opponent's game plan.
